cards.title: Create the React UI
cards.description: Render columns, cards, forms, and drag interactions.

cards.title: Build the API
cards.description: Expose CRUD and move endpoints backed by JSON storage.

cards.title: Validate PR checks
cards.description: Confirm CI checks, review approval, and merge rules all work as expected.

cards.title: Map the board workflow
cards.description: Sketch the first columns and card states for the project.

cards.title: Document production release steps
cards.description: Capture what changed, testing evidence, known issues, and rollback notes.

cards.title: Review card priority UX
cards.description: Check that priority badges are clear on desktop and mobile board layouts.

cards.title: Prepare demo data
cards.description: Add realistic cards so the board is easier to evaluate during review.
